subject: Fermi GBM trigger 510207699/170303182 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger
510207699/170303182 at 04:21:34.33 on 03 March 2017,
tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB.
This trigger is due to local particles."
